summary.intent: Investigate Linear issue CHA-14 to understand what changes are needed to add a [crm] section to the project's config schema.
summary.outcome: Investigation was completed with relevant files read and understood; files schema.rs, template.rs, and validate.rs were identified as needing changes, but no implementation code was written per the investigation-stage instructions.

repo: Config schema is defined in crates/config/src/schema.rs with a build_schema_map() function that maps section names to their schemas
Config sections follow a pattern: a struct (e.g., CronConfig, CalDavConfig) defined in the relevant crate's types.rs, then registered in schema.rs, template.rs, and validate.rs
CRM types are defined in crates/crm/src/types.rs
Existing simple config sections like cron, caldav, and webhooks serve as reference patterns for adding the new [crm] section

code.finding: Contains build_schema_map() where new config sections are registered; CRM entry needs to be added here
Contains validation logic for config sections; CRM validation needs to be added alongside cron/caldav/webhooks
Contains the config file template; a [crm] section comment/example block needs to be added
Contains CRM-specific types that would back the CrmConfig struct

workflow: The orchestration workflow separates investigation from implementation — investigation stage posts a Linear comment summary but makes no code changes
Background tasks (cargo check, cargo test) were launched in parallel with file reading to establish a clean baseline before starting work
The agent uses a Linear comment as a persistent workpad to track status across runs

friction: Background tasks (cargo check, cargo test) were still running when the agent tried to check their output, requiring a follow-up poll
validate.rs was read multiple times in succession, suggesting the file was large or the relevant section was hard to locate on first pass
open_items: Actual implementation of the [crm] config section in schema.rs, template.rs, and validate.rs is deferred to the implementation stage
The exact fields required in CrmConfig are not yet determined — depends on what crates/crm/src/types.rs exposes and what the issue description specifies
Linear comment with investigation summary and workpad update still needs to be posted (transcript ends at file reading stage)
